privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots simulation world (vineyard_scenario.wbt). The verified facts are that the world coordinate system must be configured to 'WGS84' and the north direction to [0, 1, 0]. Additionally, the GPS reference is expected to be [38.281, -122.278, 25.5] and the 'rtk_gps' node accuracy inside the 'AG_TRACTOR' robot node must be set to 0.02. The exported world file must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/vineyard_georeferenced.wbt.
